description.ko: 폭우와 화려한 홀로그램, 미래 도시의 속도감이 어우러진 서정적인 사이버펑크 풍경.
description.en: A moody cyberpunk cityscape blending heavy rain, vibrant holograms, and the motion blur of a futuristic metropolis.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Neon Petal Arteries.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by glowing maglev tracks and massive 3D holograms of koi fish in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on wet metallic asphalt. Flying vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a romantic futuristic urban soul.
